# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

- 200
          request_method:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          content_type:
            - "application/json"
            - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
          cache_ttl: 300
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache
          vary_headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Encoding
          vary_query_params:
            - page
            - limit
            - sort
            - category
        enabled: true

      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 20
          size_unit: megabytes
        enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Payment Service
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - payment-service
      - api-v1
      - financial
    routes:
      # Payment Processing
      - name: payment-processing-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
          - "~/api/v1/payments/(?<payment_id>[a-f0-9-]+)$"
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - payment-processing
          - api-v1

      # Payment Refunds
      - name: payment-refunds-route
        paths:
          - "~/api/v1/payments/(?<payment_id>[a-f0-9-]+)/refund"
          - /api/v1/refunds
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - payment-refunds
          - api-v1

      # Payment Methods
      - name: payment-methods-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payment-methods
          - "~/api/v1/users/(?<user_id>[a-f0-9-]+)/payment-methods"
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - payment-methods
          - api-v1

      # Payment Webhooks (from external payment providers)
      - name: payment-webhooks-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/webhooks/stripe
          - /api/v1/payments/webhooks/paypal
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - payment-webhooks
          - api-v1
          - external

    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 30
          hour: 1000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 3
          redis_timeout: 2000
          fault_tolerant: true
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Rate limit exceeded for payment service"
        enabled: true

      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 2
          size_unit: megabytes
        enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Notification Service
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: notification-service
    url: http://notification-service-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - notification-service
      - api-v1
      - messaging
    routes:
      # Send Notifications
      - name: notification-send-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/send
          - /api/v1/notifications/broadcast
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - notification-send
          - api-v1

      # Notification Management
      - name: notification-management-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
          - "~/api/v1/notifications/(?<notification_id>[a-f0-9-]+)"
          - "~/api/v1/users/(?<user_id>[a-f0-9-]+)/notifications"
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - notification-management
          - api-v1

      # Notification Preferences
      - name: notification-preferences-route
        paths:
          - "~/api/v1/users/(?<user_id>[a-f0-9-]+)/notification-preferences"
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - PATCH
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true

          - notification-preferences
          - api-v1

      # Notification Templates
      - name: notification-templates-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/templates
          - "~/api/v1/notifications/templates/(?<template_id>[a-f0-9-]+)"
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - notification-templates
          - api-v1

    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 5000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 4
          redis_timeout: 2000
          fault_tolerant: true
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Rate limit exceeded for notification service"
        enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Analytics Service
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: analytics-service
    url: http://analytics-service-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 15000
    write_timeout: 120000
    read_timeout: 120000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - analytics-service
      - api-v1
      - reporting
    routes:
      # Analytics Dashboard
      - name: analytics-dashboard-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/analytics/dashboard
          - /api/v1/analytics/summary
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - analytics-dashboard
          - api-v1

      # Analytics Reports
      - name: analytics-reports-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/analytics/reports

        protocols:
          - http

      - name: analytics-metrics-route

        methods:

        protocols:
          - http

        strip_path: false

    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 2000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 5
          redis_timeout: 2000
          fault_tolerant: true
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Rate limit exceeded for analytics service"
        enabled: true

      - name: proxy-cache
        config:
          response_code:
            - 200
          request_method:
            - GET
          content_type:
            - "application/json"
          cache_ttl: 60
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache
        enabled: true

# =============================================================================
# Consumers - API Consumers
# =============================================================================
consumers:
  # Internal Web Application
  - username: web-app-consumer
    custom_id: web-app-001
    tags:
      - internal
      - web-application
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-app-api-key-2024-secure-token
        tags:
          - web-app-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 20000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 6
          fault_tolerant: true

  # Mobile Application
  - username: mobile-app-consumer
    custom_id: mobile-app-001
    tags:
      - internal
      - mobile-application
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: mobile-app-api-key-2024-secure-token
        tags:
          - mobile-app-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 15000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 6
          fault_tolerant: true

  # Third-Party Partner
  - username: partner-consumer
    custom_id: partner-001
    tags:
      - external
      - partner
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: partner-api-key-2024-secure-token
        tags:
          - partner-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 5000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 6
          fault_tolerant: true

  # Admin Dashboard
  - username: admin-consumer
    custom_id: admin-001
    tags:
      - internal
      - admin
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: admin-api-key-2024-secure-token
        tags:
          - admin-key
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          hour: 50000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 6
          fault_tolerant: true

# =============================================================================
# Global Plugins
# =============================================================================
plugins:
  # Key Authentication (Global)
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - X-API-Key
      key_in_query: true
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - authentication
      - global

  # CORS (Global)
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://partner.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
        - HEAD
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Version
        - Authorization
        - Content-Length
        - Content-MD5
        - Content-Type
        - Date
        - X-API-Key
        - X-Auth-Token
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-Customer-ID
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Auth-Token
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - cors
      - global

  # Request Transformer (Global)
  - name: request-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Gateway: kong"
          - "X-Gateway-Version: 3.0"
          - "X-Forwarded-Proto: https"
      append:
        headers:
          - "X-Request-Start: $(now)"
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - request-transformer
      - global

  # Response Transformer (Global)
  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      remove:
        headers:
          - X-Powered-By
          - Server
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff"
          - "X-Frame-Options: DENY"
          - "X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block"
          - "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
          - "Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
          - "Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'"
          - "Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate"
          - "Pragma: no-cache"
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - response-transformer
      - security
      - global

  # IP Restriction (Global - Block known bad IPs)
  - name: ip-restriction
    config:
      deny:
        - 192.168.1.100
        - 10.0.0.50
      status: 403
      message: "Access denied: Your IP address is not allowed"
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - ip-restriction
      - security
      - global

  # Bot Detection (Global)
  - name: bot-detection
    config:
      deny:
        - "Scrapy"
        - "curl"
        - "HttpClient"
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - bot-detection
      - security
      - global

  # Correlation ID (Global)
  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-ID
      generator: uuid#counter
      echo_downstream: true
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - correlation-id
      - observability
      - global

  # HTTP Log (Global)
  - name: http-log
    config:
      http_endpoint: http://log-collector.internal:9200/kong-logs/_doc
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      flush_timeout: 2
      retry_count: 5
      queue_size: 1000
      content_type: application/json
      headers:
        Content-Type: application/json
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - http-log
      - observability
      - global

  # Prometheus Metrics (Global)
  - name: prometheus
    config:
      per_consumer: true
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - prometheus
      - observability
      - global

  # Request Termination for maintenance mode (disabled by default)
  - name: request-termination
    config:
      status_code: 503
      content_type: "application/json"
      body: '{"error": "Service temporarily unavailable", "message": "We are performing scheduled maintenance. Please try again later.", "retry_after": 3600}'
    enabled: false
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - maintenance-mode
      - global

# =============================================================================
# Certificates (for HTTPS termination)
# =============================================================================
certificates:
  - cert: |
      -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
      <REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SSL_CERTIFICATE>
      -----END CERTIFICATE-----
    key: |
      -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
      <REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SSL_PRIVATE_KEY>
      -----END PRIVATE KEY-----
    tags:
      - api-gateway-cert
    snis:
      - name: api.example.com
        tags:
          - primary-domain
      - name: "*.api.example.com"
        tags:
          - wildcard-domain
